title: Limited Sprint
body:
# 🏃‍♂️ Limited Sprint
Limited Sprint is a datapack that adds a "STAMINA" meter which falls when the player is sprinting. When the bar becomes empty (visible above hotbar), the player looses the ability to sprint and jump.

![Stamina Bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/17d86a4dab3b2db46885aefbdbaf4047f630c8f4_0.webp)

# Extra:
If you're a mapmaker/datapack maker who wants to use this datapack/its code, click on "View Source" on the left side of the web browser screen, above the author's profile. This will lead you to the github where you'll be able to see how to modify the datapack's config according to your needs.
